approach: The challenge requires a three-step workflow: 1) POST to /api/prism/origin to get a runId, seed, and salt. 2) Generate a proof by hashing the seed and salt (using SHA256, hex-encoded, sliced to 24 chars) and PUT it to /api/prism/bridge along with the runId. 3) PATCH the runId and the returned bridgeTicket to /api/prism/complete to finalize the challenge.
uncertainties: None, the workflow and transformation logic are clearly defined in the evidence.
